title: KandyToys TY1248 Toys, Multicolor
seller_info_text: The Old Railway Line Garden Centre
features: All aboard! Kids will love playing conductor with the KandyToys Pull Back Toy Trains
Each of the 6 colourful trains feature a pull back mechanism and will keep kids entertained for hours!
Each train measures 5cm - perfect for little hands to grip onto
The trains also come in a handy gifting or storage tube
description: Product Description All aboard! Kids will love playing conductor with the KandyToys Pull Back Toy Trains. Includes 6 colourful trains in a storage tube Safety Warning Suitable for ages 3+
